name: Soft Sugar Cookies (Southern Cream Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease cookie sheets.
2. Cream together shortening and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs, vanilla, and sour cream to the mixture; beat well.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing well.
6. Stir in chopped walnuts if desired.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto the prepared cookie sheets, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
8. Using a small glass or spoon, press each cookie flat and sprinkle with sugar-cinnamon mixture on both sides.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
10. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheets for a few minutes before transferring them to wire racks to cool completely. Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies.
